productDisplayName: Timex Men Black Dial Watch T2N156
description: Article number: T2N156Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has steel toned hour and minute hands and markings with glow-in-the-dark inlay, red seconds hand, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw and push buttons to reset the time and functions, date display on the 3 hour mark, tachymeter, three-faced chronograph displayStrap style: Black, textured, leather strap with contrast stitched detail and perforated detail, secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
